title: PR 104 · Contradicted by tests
description: The PR text claims backward compatibility, but a supplied legacy-client test fails.
request: Rename the health field without breaking clients that still read health_score.

requirements.text: Responses expose the new nutrition_score field.
Clients reading health_score continue to work during the deprecation window.

pull_request.title: Rename health score
pull_request.description: Renames health_score to nutrition_score and claims compatibility.

artifacts.summary: Legacy client fails because health_score is undefined.

recorded_assessments.rationale: The diff and passing new-client test cover nutrition_score.
The legacy-client test directly fails and the diff removes the old field.
